title: Learn how Professor David J. Malan realized computer science is the field for him.
summary: A CS50 video featuring Professor David J. Malan discussing how he discovered computer science as his field. CS50 is Harvard University's foundational course in computer science and programming available across multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: Professor David J. Malan recounts how he came to recognize computer science as his field. The video is part of CS50, Harvard University's foundational course in computer science and programming. CS50 is offered across multiple platforms, including edX, the Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
